word: G203 - ἀκροβυστία - akrobystía - ak-rob-oos-tee'-ah - Not circumcised

sections.paragraph:
ἀκροβυστία - akrobustia - ak-rob-oos-tee'-ah

From G206 and probably a modified form of πόσθη posthē (the penis or male sexual organ); the prepuce; by implication an uncircumcised (that is, gentile, figuratively unregenerate) state or person: - not circumcised, uncircumcised [with G2192], uncircumcision.
